original: Woven out of the most striking shade of yellow in the quadrant, this leopard print jumpsuit was handstitched to provide the maximum amount of flexibility for the user while still somehow clinging to every curve and feature tighter than food-grade plastic wrap. A few of the ‘spots’ bear a passing resemblance to hearts.
